title: Type your event details
noEditionRights: You do not have edition rights on this event.
onlyAdditionalFieldsCanBeEdited: Only additional fields of the agenda can be edited here.
onlyAdditionalFieldsCanBeEditedInfo: This event was added to the agenda "%agenda%" through a share or by aggregation. Only members of the agenda where the event was contributed can change its content.
requestEditionRightsInfo: This event comes from another agenda. Edition rights are required to change its main fields (ex: title, description, timings...)
shareRestrictionInfo: The following issues must be addressed to allow make the event "%event%" shareable on the agenda "%agenda%"
